testcase.name: test_unified_cognitive_snapshot_returns_200
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration73_auth_insights.py:85: in test_unified_cognitive_snapshot_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
